description: MCP server proxy for SQLBot Text-to-SQL queries and report generation.
name: io.github.wenRou21/sqlbot-mcp-proxy

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the SQLBot service, for example http://127.0.0.1:8000.
environmentVariables.name: SQLBOT_MCP_PROXY_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: SQLBot API access key. If omitted, the proxy can try FEISHU_ASK_ACCESS_KEY or read from the configured Docker container.
environmentVariables.name: SQLBOT_MCP_PROXY_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: SQLBot API secret key. If omitted, the proxy can try FEISHU_ASK_SECRET_KEY or read from the configured Docker container.
environmentVariables.name: SQLBOT_MCP_PROXY_SECRET_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Docker container name used when reading FEISHU_ASK_ACCESS_KEY and FEISHU_ASK_SECRET_KEY from a running SQLBot container.
environmentVariables.name: SQLBOT_MCP_PROXY_DOCKER_CONTAINER

title: SQLBot MCP Proxy
